summary: Verified HOS Practice Scenarios (new) + 24-hr grid labels + Split Sleeper regression + 60/70 calc regression. All required data-testids resolved and flows work end-to-end on mobile viewport.
critical_code_review_comments: HosPracticePage is ~315 lines — reasonable; MiniCycleCalc could later be split into its own file for reuse.
PracticeRunner uses data-testids parameterized by `category` (combined-*, multiday-*, eightday-*, split-*) — clean and matches test contract.
Mini calc uses local React state only and is remounted on category change (key={catId}) — correctly isolated from the real /hours-of-service tool.
EldGrid hour labels now use 00..23 24-hr format (Mid/Noon strings absent).
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 18 assertions for the new HOS Practice feature passed: login, /hours-of-service/practice page renders, 3 category tabs (combined/multiday/eightday) with 5/3/3 scenarios each, combined-restart-btn + combined-pick-scenario-btn work, scenario picker lists 5 entries (0..4), shift question accepts HH:MM 24-hr input and advances to hours question, restart resets back to shift question (hours question removed), multi-day shows prior-days-context, eightday shows recap-table + mini-cycle-calc. Mini calc: verdict shows '1 avail' at 9h (60+9=69, limit 70) and '+10 over' at 20h. Reveal button toggles mini-answer. EldGrid shows military labels 00/06/12/18/23 — Mid/Noon absent. Module tile module-practice visible on training hub. Split sleeper /hours-of-service/split-sleeper Practice tab still renders q-qualify, split-restart-btn, split-pick-scenario-btn. 60/70 calc page still loads without regression.
